summary: First docs pass for runtime2-builder-plan. Updated 5 architecture docs to reflect %__data__% action result flow, condition orchestration (if/elseif/else), and step.Disabled mechanism. Added XML doc comments for security guards (JsonStringNavigator limits, ResolveDeep breadth guard) and Data.Clone() event semantics. Added new sections for Data.Compare and security hardening summary.

changes.description: Removed Return from Action properties, updated run sequence to %__data__%, added Step.Disabled property, updated execution flow diagram
Updated dispatch kernel to show %__data__% storage, removed Return from Action entity, updated sub-step control description
Updated User context action flow to show %__data__% instead of Return mapping
Rewrote sub-step execution section to reflect context-backed step.Disabled. Added condition orchestration section. Added Data.Compare section. Added security hardening limits table.
Added %__data__% action result variable section with usage example
Added XML docs on MaxElementCount and MaxDepth constants
Added XML docs on Clone() and ShallowClone() explaining intentional event exclusion
Documented depth and breadth guards on ResolveDeep
